meta.description: Test cases for /multimodel:delegate command. Verifies correct 4-phase workflow: argument parsing, capability discovery via subagent, pre-flight question gathering, and claudish execution. Tests model resolution, alias table, no-prefix rules, session directory creation, and error handling.
meta.notes: v1.2.0: Headless-mode fix — added --no-preflight to all tests except 13 so they skip Phase 3 (AskUserQuestion) and reach claudish in non-interactive (claude -p) runs. Test 13 marked skip_headless:true and simplified to verify only Phase 1-2 observable behavior (reads preferences file, creates session dir) since AskUserQuestion blocks in headless. v1.1.0: 7 fixes from 4-model team review — (1) bash_min_count:1 added to every test to prevent vacuous pass on empty transcripts; (2) task_agent_is added to tests 02 and 10; (3) alias tests updated to bash_claudish_model_exact with resolved IDs; (4) --quiet flag gap documented (no analyzer check available); (5) added pre-flight test 13; (6) added error-scenario test 14; (7) has_post_verification_reads added to session-dir test 06 and claudish-flags test 07. v1.0.0: Initial suite — 12 tests covering argument parsing, model aliases, capability discovery, claudish flags, session directory, error handling, and no-prefix rules.

test_cases.description: Explicit model + slash command should execute via claudish without capability discovery. Alias 'grok' must resolve to exact ID 'grok-code-fast-1'.
Natural task (no slash command) should trigger capability discovery subagent before claudish. Verifies Task is delegated to dev:researcher and alias 'grok' resolves to exact ID.
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate --no-preflight grok implement a health check endpoint

test_cases.description: Short alias 'gemini' should resolve to exact full ID 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview' in claudish command.
Full model ID 'grok-code-fast-1' (not an alias) should be passed verbatim to claudish with exact match.
Model minimax-m2.5 must NOT get mm@ or minimax/ prefix. Exact match verifies no mutation.
Session directory created under ai-docs/sessions/delegate-*, prompt.md and task.md written. Orchestrator must read result files (.exit, result.md) after claudish completes.

Claudish command must have required flags: --stdin, output redirect, exit code capture. Orchestrator must read result files after execution. Note: --quiet flag is always present alongside --stdin but the analyzer has no dedicated check for it (known gap).
Should read .claude/multimodel-team.json for model defaults and claudeFlags.
Orchestrator should NOT pre-solve the task (no Read/Grep on project files before launching claudish). Alias 'grok' resolves to exact ID.
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate --no-preflight grok investigate how the plugin system resolves commands at runtime

test_cases.description: Capability discovery subagent must be a dev:researcher Task call that writes capability-discovery.md to session dir.
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate --no-preflight grok implement user authentication with JWT tokens

test_cases.description: With --no-preflight, skip question gathering and go straight to claudish execution. Alias 'grok' resolves to exact ID.
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate --no-preflight grok /dev:dev add a loading spinner to submit button

test_cases.description: Unknown model ID must be passed verbatim — no substitution or discovery.

Without --no-preflight, Phase 3 (pre-flight) runs AskUserQuestion which blocks in headless (claude -p). This test verifies only the observable setup behavior before AskUserQuestion is called: orchestrator reads preferences file and creates the session directory. Claudish execution is NOT verified here — that would require interactive mode. Skipped in headless CI runs.
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate grok /dev:dev add user authentication to the app

test_cases.description: When claudish is invoked with a clearly-fake model ID, the orchestrator must still invoke claudish (no early bail-out) and pass the model verbatim without substitution. No model discovery should be attempted.
